stemHtml: An aeroplane in straight and level flight at 200 kt is subjected to a sudden disturbance in speed. Assuming the angle of attack remains constant initially and the load factor reaches a value of 1.69:

options.a: the speed will have decreased by 30 kt.
options.b: the speed will have decreased by 60 kt.
options.c: the speed will have increased by 60 kt.
options.d: the speed will have increased by 30 kt.
